content.problemStatement:
You are given two spanning trees T1T_1T1‚Äč and T2T_2T2‚Äč on the same set of NNN vertices (numbered 111 through NNN). For each edge e1e_1e1‚Äč in T1T_1T1‚Äč, you have to calculate the number of edges e2‚ąąT2e_2 \in T_2e2‚Äč‚ąąT2‚Äč which satisfy the following conditions:


T1‚ąíe1+e2T_1 - e_1 + e_2T1‚Äč‚ąíe1‚Äč+e2‚Äč (the graph formed by removing the edge e1e_1e1‚Äč from T1T_1T1‚Äč and adding the edge e2e_2e2‚Äč) is a spanning tree
T2‚ąíe2+e1T_2 - e_2 + e_1T2‚Äč‚ąíe2‚Äč+e1‚Äč is also a spanning tree
constraints: the sum of NNN over all test cases does not exceed 2‚čÖ1052 \cdot 10^52‚čÖ105
Subtasks**Subtask #1 (20 points):** the sum of NNN over all test cases does not exceed 10410^4104
content.inputFormat:
The first line of the input contains a single integer TTT denoting the number of test cases. The description of TTT test cases follows.
The first line of each test case contains a single integer NNN.
Each of the following N‚ąí1N-1N‚ąí1 lines contains two space-separated integers uuu and vvv denoting an edge in T1T_1T1‚Äč between vertices uuu and vvv.
The following N‚ąí1N-1N‚ąí1 lines describe the edges of T2T_2T2‚Äč in the same format.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, print N‚ąí1N-1N‚ąí1 space-separated integers ‚ÄĒ the number of valid edges e2e_2e2‚Äč for each edge e1‚ąąT1e_1 \in T_1e1‚Äč‚ąąT1‚Äč (in the order in which they are given on the input).
